zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Cecilia De Monthegon於1165年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Adam de Montbegon26歲，母親Matilda FitzSwain30歲。她於大約1181年與Lord William de Radcliffe結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1225年在她的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Cecilia De Monthegon于1165年出生在英国藍卡爾时，她的父亲Adam de Montbegon26岁，母亲Matilda FitzSwain30岁。她于大约1181年与Lord William de Radcliffe结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1225年在她的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Cecilia De Monthegon was born in 1165, in Lancashire, England, her father, Adam de Montbegon, was 26 and her mother, Matilda FitzSwain, was 30. She married Lord William de Radcliffe about 1181. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1225, in her hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Cecilia De Monthegon est née en 1165, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Montbegon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Matilda FitzSwain, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Lord William de Radcliffe environ 1181. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1225, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Cecilia De Monthegon 1165 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Montbegon 26 und ihre Mutter Matilda FitzSwain 30. Sie hat um 1181 Lord William de Radcliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1225 im Alter von 60 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Cecilia De Monthegon è nata il nel 1165 nel Lancashire, England, sua padre, Adam de Montbegon, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Matilda FitzSwain, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Lord William de Radcliffe circa 1181. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1225, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Cecilia De Monthegonが1165年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Adam de Montbegonは26歳，母Matilda FitzSwainは30歳であった。約1181年にLord William de Radcliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1225年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Cecilia De Monthegon(이)가 1165년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Montbegon(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda FitzSwain(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1181년 Lord William de Radcliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 그녀의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Cecilia De Monthegon nasceu em 1165, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Adam de Montbegon, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Matilda FitzSwain, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord William de Radcliffe aproximadamente 1181. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1225, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Cecilia De Monthegon родилась в 1165 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Adam de Montbegon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda FitzSwain, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord William de Radcliffe около 1181 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1225 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Cecilia De Monthegon nació en 1165, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Adam de Montbegon, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Matilda FitzSwain, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lord William de Radcliffe aproximadamente 1181. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1225, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
